scripts.dev: concurrently --names 'app,agent' --prefix-colors 'cyan,green' 'turbo dev --filter=@isimple/app' 'cd apps/agent && uv run uvicorn src.immosimple_agent.main:app --reload --port 8000'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names 'web,app,agent' --prefix-colors 'blue,cyan,green' 'turbo dev --filter=@isimple/web' 'turbo dev --filter=@isimple/app' 'cd apps/agent && uv run uvicorn src.immosimple_agent.main:app --reload --port 8000'
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run uvicorn src.immosimple_agent.main:app --reload --port 8000
